events.notes: First tranche of TON Foundation reserve began unlocking; foundation holds were subject to a multi-year linear vesting schedule starting mid-2022.
Continued linear monthly/quarterly unlock of TON Foundation reserve tranche through 2023.
Ongoing annual tranche from the ~2.04B TON foundation reserve wallet visible on-chain at Tonscan.
Projected 2025 tranche from foundation reserve; exact monthly cadence subject to governance decisions.
Ongoing proof-of-stake validator/nominator rewards continuously emitted; no fixed cliff, rate ~0.6% annually of circulating supply per network parameters.
Final years of the ~4-year foundation reserve vesting schedule; schedule runs approximately through 2026.

summary: Toncoin does not have traditional VC investor or team vesting cliffs in the conventional sense — the network was relaunched as a community/open-source project after Telegram's withdrawal. The primary structured unlock pressure comes from the TON Foundation's reserve of approximately 2.04 billion TON (~40% of initial supply), which vests linearly over roughly four years from mid-2021 through 2025–2026, releasing on the order of 200M tokens per year. Additional continuous supply inflation comes from proof-of-stake staking rewards (~0.6% annually), which are modest relative to the foundation unlock tranches.
caveats: 1) Exact monthly unlock dates and per-tranche token amounts for the foundation reserve are NOT_AVAILABLE_FREE_TIER on tokenunlocks.app (TON is not listed on their free public dashboard as of mid-2025). 2) The precise vesting contract addresses and schedules require cross-referencing Tonscan on-chain data with foundation blog posts — the foundation transparency report URL cited was live as of 2023 but may have moved. 3) Token amounts per tranche above are approximations derived from the publicly stated ~2.04B total reserve divided over ~10 annual/semi-annual periods; the foundation has discretion over exact release timing. 4) Messari's detailed unlock schedule for TON is behind their Pro paywall (NOT_AVAILABLE_FREE_TIER). 5) CryptoRank's vesting tab for TON showed only high-level allocation data, not granular unlock dates, on the free tier.
